name: copilot-bridge
description: Exposes the user's GitHub Copilot chat entitlement over a TCP localhost endpoint (and an optional OpenAI-compatible HTTP endpoint), with a usage-stats dashboard.

aiBench.copilotBridge.openAiPort.description: TCP port the OpenAI-compatible HTTP endpoint binds to when started. Default matches Ollama so existing OpenAI/Ollama clients pick it up.

aiBench.copilotBridge.openAiBindAddress.description: Address the OpenAI-compatible endpoint binds to. Loopback only by default — set to 0.0.0.0 only behind your own ingress.

aiBench.copilotBridge.openAiAutoStart.description: Start the OpenAI-compatible endpoint automatically when VSCode launches.

aiBench.copilotBridge.openAiAuthRequired.description: Require Bearer-token auth on the OpenAI endpoint. Default false — when bound to loopback (default), an unauthenticated endpoint is safe. Always true in effect when bound off-loopback.

scripts.package: npm run compile && npx @vscode/vsce package --out copilot-bridge.vsix --allow-missing-repository
